subcodes.first_line: O daughter of the Kingdom! Thy letter was received. The meanings emanated from a pure heart and a luminous soul. Render thanks unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنت ملکوت نامه رسید معانی منبعث از قلبی پاک بود و جانی تابناک شکر کن خدا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation
